_comment_1: Digital Asset Links for the JiggyJoy Android TWA.
_comment_3: REPLACE the sha256_cert_fingerprints value below with the real fingerprint from your Bubblewrap keystore.
_comment_5: The fingerprint is 64 hex chars with colons, e.g. 14:6D:E9:83:...
_comment_6: If you change the application id or re-sign with a different key, this file MUST be updated and redeployed.
